quote: Grant Consulting helped me get a full scholarship to a UK university. The team guided me through every step, from IELTS prep to visa interview. I could not have done it without them.
name: Aziza Karimova
title: Scholarship Student, University of Leeds

quote: I was confused about which country to choose. The consultants sat with me, analyzed my profile, and found the perfect program in Canada. Now I am studying and working part-time.
name: Jasur Alimov
title: Master's Student, University of Toronto

quote: The visa process felt impossible until Grant Consulting took over. They prepared all my documents, coached me for the interview, and I got approved on the first try.
